commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=917bfb2cc552c40fa6e8d20233c4d2b2e4ab4db2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds dynamic configured-model choices and an argsMenu for /model, routes Discord bare /model back to its picker, sanitizes Telegram native command callback data, and expands registry, Discord, and Telegram tests.

PR surface: Source +67, Tests +210. Total +277 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. On the PR head, one short configured model plus one long OpenRouter-style model makes the Telegram menu drop the long /model choice while still sending a partial menu; current main's model picker has compact callback coverage for that shape.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the remaining blocker is concrete, but the PR carries clawsweeper:human-review and should not continue through automerge or automated repair without maintainer direction.

target.title: feat: add model switch choices to /model
target.author: clawsean
